project_type: Next.js 16 App Router with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, Radix UI
verification_instructions: Run pnpm build to confirm no TypeScript/compilation errors. Run pnpm lint for code quality.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full access. Azure AI Services endpoint: https://tlate.cognitiveservices.azure.com/ with multi-service key. Services available: Translator, Text Analytics, Computer Vision (OCR), Speech, Language Understanding.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing patterns: API routes in app/api/, components in components/features/, tool pages in app/tools/, use existing UI components from components/ui/. Pro features gate behind subscription verification using lib/paypal.ts verifySubscription pattern.
key_patterns: API routes use NextRequest/NextResponse. Pro verification pattern: check subscriptionId via verifySubscription(). Components use 'use client' directive. Styling: Tailwind CSS with card/button components from components/ui/. Lucide icons. CANONICAL_DOMAIN from lib/seo-utils. AdContainer placement. BreadcrumbSchema for SEO. Tools page lists tools in TOOLS array.
directory_structure: app/ - pages and API routes, components/ - reusable components (features/, premium/, ui/, ads/, layouts/), lib/ - utilities and config, types/ - TypeScript types
